summary: List automations executed in the past 30 minutes
description: List automations executed in the past 30 minutes. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/workflow_automations/executed_automations/recent. Required parameters: candidate_id, offer_id, disqualify_reason_id, company_id. Optional parameters include trigger_type.
example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/workflow_automations/executed_automations/recent

Required params: candidate_id, offer_id, disqualify_reason_id, company_id

Optional params: trigger_type
